name: Asparagus Beef Roll-Ups
recipeIngredient: 20 spears of asparagus, blanched until tender
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large saute pan.
2. Season the beef tenderloin with kosher salt and black pepper.
3. Sear the beef on all sides until very brown.
4. Meanwhile, make the horseradish mayonnaise: In a small bowl, combine grated horseradish, mayonnaise, and chives. Season with additional salt and pepper; set aside.
5. Remove the meat from the pan and let it cool completely.
6. Using a very sharp knife, slice the cooled beef into 10 thin slices.
7. Season each slice with salt and pepper.
8. Spread a thin layer of horseradish mayonnaise on one side of each beef slice.
9. Lay 2 spears of asparagus in the center of each piece of beef.
10. Roll up the beef over the asparagus, encasing it completely.
11. Arrange the rolled-up rolls on a plate.
12. Drizzle with additional horseradish mayonnaise.
Yield: 20 hors d'oeuvres
